title: China-to-Morocco Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: IMANOR NM / IEC 62109 Inverter Safety Certification
rows.target_requirement: IMANOR, Morocco's national standardisation body, adopts IEC standards as Moroccan National Standards (NM). Solar PV inverters are expected to meet IEC 62109-1 (safety for power converters — general requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (safety for PV inverters) as adopted into the NM framework. IMANOR can issue conformity marks or accept third-party test reports from accredited laboratories against these standards. Mandatory conformity may also be required under a Moroccan ministerial arrêté designating electrical equipment for market surveillance.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 as adopted by IMANOR (NM framework)
IEC 62109-2 as adopted by IMANOR (NM framework)
Moroccan ministerial arrêtés on electrical equipment market surveillance
rows.china_equivalent: China solar PV inverter safety is governed by GB/T 37408 (technical specification for PV inverters) and supplementary NB/T or T/CPIA group standards. GB/T 37408 covers protection and safety functions but is not identical in scope or test methodology to IEC 62109-1/2. A Chinese test report against GB/T 37408 is not directly accepted by IMANOR or a Moroccan project owner without IEC-route evidence.
rows.gap: Obtain or commission test reports from an accredited laboratory against IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2, and prepare a declaration of conformity or IMANOR conformity-mark application for the Morocco market. Chinese GB/T 37408 test data may support a gap analysis but does not replace IEC-route evidence. Confirm with IMANOR or the Moroccan project owner whether an arrêté mandates certification before sale or installation.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a ministerial arrêté designates the product; IEC 62109 compliance is the accepted technical route via IMANOR NM adoption; project-owner or lender requirements may make it de facto mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid-connected PV inverters under Chinese market surveillance; GB/T 37408 is the applicable standard

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 test evidence is a useful starting point but does not satisfy the IMANOR / IEC 62109 route expected for Morocco. Commission IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 testing from an accredited laboratory before shipment.

rows.requirement: EMC and Electrical Safety for PV Power Converters in Morocco
rows.target_requirement: Morocco applies IEC-based electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) standards through IMANOR NM adoption. Power conversion equipment including PV inverters should meet relevant IEC CISPR conducted and radiated emission limits and immunity requirements. IMANOR NM 03.3 series covers electrical safety for low-voltage equipment including requirements derived from IEC 60364 installation rules. Moroccan projects in public-sector programmes may require CE marking-equivalent documentation as a reference, particularly for EU-funded or IFC / World Bank projects.
target_standards: IEC CISPR 11 / CISPR 32 as adopted via IMANOR NM
IEC 60364 installation rules as adopted by IMANOR
rows.china_equivalent: China PV inverters are tested for EMC under GB/T 17626 and GB 4824 series (CISPR 11 equivalents), and electrical safety under GB 4943 and related standards. These Chinese test results give useful technical evidence but are not equivalent to IMANOR NM or IEC CISPR certifications for the Morocco market.
rows.gap: Supplement Chinese EMC test evidence with IEC CISPR-route tests from an accredited laboratory if the project owner, lender, or IMANOR conformity review requires it. For EU-funded projects, CE marking under the EU EMC Directive and Low Voltage Directive may be specifically requested.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a Moroccan arrêté designates the product for conformity; IEC CISPR / IEC 60364 compliance is the accepted technical route; project or lender requirements may be more specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese CCC or voluntary certification routes; GB 4824 / GB/T 17626 are the applicable EMC standards

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EMC test reports are technically comparable but not directly accepted as IMANOR NM conformity evidence. Obtain IEC CISPR-route test evidence from an accredited laboratory if the project or procurement requires it.
